companies.name: Ever Starter Co
companies.description: A ready-to-run general-purpose starter company with a CEO, a product team, and a growth team, built to take any new business from raw idea to shipped first launch.

companies.name: Atlas Engineering
companies.description: A product-engineering organization that takes web software from rough idea to production, covering backend, frontend, infrastructure, quality, and security under one roof.

companies.name: Aurora Creative Agency
companies.description: A brand and content agency that turns raw business goals into positioning, campaigns, and finished creative — strategy first, production second, review always.

companies.name: Bulwark Security
companies.description: A defensive security audit and advisory firm that scopes authorized assessments, models threats, audits applications and infrastructure, and turns verified findings into prioritized remediation guidance.

companies.name: Craftsman Dev Shop
companies.description: A small, disciplined software studio that turns rough ideas into shipped features through brainstorm, plan, test-first build, independent review, and a careful release.

companies.name: Ledgerline Capital
companies.description: An investment research firm that turns market questions into evidence-graded internal analysis memos and adversarial risk reviews — strictly internal research, never financial advice, never trade execution.

companies.name: Meridian Research Lab
companies.description: A rigorous research lab that turns open questions into evidence-backed reports through structured literature review, quantitative analysis, adversarial methodological critique, and careful scientific writing.

companies.name: Northstar Product Consulting
companies.description: A product strategy consultancy that turns fuzzy product questions into evidence-backed strategy, prioritized roadmaps, and defensible pricing recommendations.

companies.name: Pixelforge Game Studio
companies.description: An indie game studio org that takes a game from raw concept to a polished playable build, with design, engineering, and art-audio teams working in tight playtest-driven loops.

companies.name: Sentinel Review Board
companies.description: An independent code-review firm that examines submitted changes for security, performance, architecture, and documentation quality, and returns a single structured review report with verdicts and prioritized findings.
